title: Digital Twins in Engineering and STEM Higher Education: A Systematic Review of Architectures, Pedagogy, and the Quality of Learning Evidence
description: Reproducible materials for a PRISMA 2020 systematic review of digital twins in higher-education engineering and STEM settings (65 included studies, 2018-2026): review protocol, database search exports, the full semantic-screening trace, extracted data with verbatim quotations, the end-to-end analysis pipeline, figures and tables, and the manuscript package. Version 2.0.0 updates the manuscript and corrects two extraction records (effect sizes and sample size) with the pipeline re-run accordingly.
